mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.breed, p.age, p.gender, p.price, p.stock, p.cover_url as coverUrl, p.description, p.health_status as healthStatus, p.vaccine_info as vaccineInfo, p.status, p.create_time as createTime from pet p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id} and p.is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select id, name, category_id as categoryId, breed, age, gender, price, stock, cover_url as coverUrl, description, health_status as healthStatus, vaccine_info as vaccineInfo, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from pet where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into pet ( name, category_id, breed, age, gender, price, stock, cover_url, description, health_status, vaccine_info, status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{breed}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{coverUrl}, #{description}, #{healthStatus}, #{vaccineInfo}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: update pet set name = #{pet.name}, category_id = #{pet.categoryId}, breed = #{pet.breed}, age = #{pet.age}, gender = #{pet.gender}, price = #{pet.price}, stock = #{pet.stock}, cover_url = #{pet.coverUrl}, description = #{pet.description}, health_status = #{pet.healthStatus}, vaccine_info = #{pet.vaccineInfo}, status = #{pet.status}, update_time = #{pet.updateTime} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update pet set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update pet set status = 0 where category_id = #{categoryId} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1
